scenario.context: Station 05 of the day run: choose frameworks and implement the UI.
scenario.mission: You make a robust technology decision and plan a maintainable implementation in Python, Java, and the web.

customerRequest.subject: Station 05: Implementation strategy
customerRequest.body: Please choose the suitable UI framework and derive the implementation plan from it.

questions.title: Framework decision
questions.prompt: Which criteria belong in a robust framework decision? (Multiple choice)

options.text: Ability to integrate with the existing architecture

feedback.correct: Correct: The selection is professionally well founded.
feedback.wrong: Partly wrong: Please give more weight to maintainability, security, and integration.

questions.title: Prioritize the implementation path
questions.prompt: What makes the most sense for the start of the implementation?

options.text: Implement and validate the core user flow first
options.rationale: Secures early feedback on the critical path.

feedback.correct: Correct: The core flow first reduces project risk.
feedback.wrong: Not suitable: Critical user paths should be prioritized.

questions.title: Implementation roadmap
questions.prompt: Put the flow for a stable UI implementation in order.

feedback.correct: Correct: The roadmap is practical and stable.
feedback.wrong: Not ideal: Please place the technology and core-component phases before testing and documentation.

questions.title: Implementation budget
questions.prompt: 26 hours are planned for UI components at 74 EUR each. What is the budget?

feedback.wrong: Please multiply the hours and rate correctly.

questions.title: Justify the technology decision
questions.prompt: Justify the framework and implementation choice in 4-6 sentences.
questions.expectedOutline: Technology justification through maintainability, integration fit, and team capability.

feedback.correct: Correct: The decision is secured in a traceable way.
feedback.wrong: Please connect maintainability, integration, and the decision more clearly.
